subject: An ornate demonic locket — a horned skull-faced medallion with a glowing red orb at its center, suspended on dark chains amid jagged metal spikes
description: A close-up of an artifact locket fashioned in the shape of a horned demonic skull. A pulsing red ember-like gem glows at the center of the face, surrounded by sharp wrought-iron spikes and curling barbed metal flourishes. Heavy dark chains drape across the upper portion of the composition, anchoring the trinket as if hanging in a shadowed shrine or display niche. The palette is dominated by deep crimson, rust-orange, and near-black metallic tones, giving the piece a sinister, infernal jewelry quality consistent with the Cult of Rakdos guild aesthetic.
foreground: horned demonic skull locket with glowing red central gem, surrounded by spiked metal frame
background: dim shadowed void with hanging chains and faint metallic textures
emotion: menacing, predatory stillness — an object that watches
